name: telegram-bot
description: Telegram bot component using the Bot API. Send messages, photos, reply keyboards, and inline keyboards.

onMessageSent.description: Fired when a message is successfully sent

sendMessage.description: Send a text message to a chat

sendPhoto.description: Send a photo to a chat

sendReplyKeyboard.description: Send a message with a reply keyboard

sendInlineKeyboard.description: Send a message with inline keyboard buttons
